User-agent: *

# Hope of AI

Hope of AI is an AI consulting and implementation partner.
We help businesses build AI systems, adopt AI across teams, and embed engineers directly into delivery workflows.

Primary pages:
- Home: https://hopeofai.com/
- Blog: https://hopeofai.com/blog/
- AI Design Sprint: https://hopeofai.com/design-sprint/
- AI Adoption Program: https://hopeofai.com/adoption-program/
- Podcast: https://hopeofai.com/podcast/

Booking:
- Calendly: https://calendly.com/mailhopeofai/30min

Social:
